narrative:
Fort Loramie Local Sd (Shelby) school district has 2,778 registered voters, with 52.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.4 percentage points.
